title: avena alba f. triflora
intro: Avena alba f. triflora, also known as oat grass or oat straw, is a type of grass belonging to the Avena genus. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Avena alba f. triflora include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and digestive issues. Avena alba f. triflora is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in herbal supplements to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
